$comment: FC17.9(a) (D-CSUBSET-C11-THREADS-HEADER + D-CSUBSET-C11-THREADS-MACHO) — C11 <threads.h> on 4 legs / 3 vehicles. elf x86_64 + arm64 (qemu) resolve mtx_*/cnd_*/tss_* as DIRECT libc.so.6 FFI (glibc>=2.34); pe64 SYNTHESIZES each over kernel32 (the `win32` vehicle); macho arm64 SYNTHESIZES each over libSystem pthread (the `pthread` vehicle) — both in synth_threads_shim.cpp, the vehicle read from the format's `librarySynthesis` block. Deterministic exit 42 (40+2 via mutable globals, so the release arm runs the real path), NO thread creation (thrd_create is Cycle 2). The macho arm RUNS in local ctest on a macOS-arm64 host (native execution, no emulator). RED-on-disable: delete shippedLibs/threads.json -> the #include fires F_ShippedHeaderNotFound and the compile fails; delete the macho `librarySynthesis` block -> synthesizeThreadsShim fails loud (recipes present, no vehicle).
